Our services

Clear support options for daily care, medical visits, personal assistance, and companionship.

Home Care

Daily assistance, hygiene, meals & comfort

Medical Accompaniment

Clinic visits, medication reminders

Personal Care

Bathing, grooming, dressing support

Companionship

Conversation, walks, emotional support

How it works

A simple flow that helps families book the right support without confusion.

1

Choose the right service

Start with home care, medical accompaniment, personal care, or companionship.

2

Set your details and timing

Pick the date, select hours, and share the client information needed for follow-up.

3

Review and confirm

Choose a caregiver, review the summary, and confirm the request in a reassuring final step.

Why families choose CareVia

The goal is not only to look good, but to make the service feel clear, human, and trustworthy.

Warm and human presentation

Families quickly understand the service and feel that the platform is built around real care needs.

Clear booking steps

Each step is separated clearly, which reduces hesitation and makes booking feel easier.

Profiles with reassuring details

Service cards and caregiver profiles create a stronger feeling of clarity before confirmation.

Comfortable on mobile too

The interface keeps the same flow while remaining easier to use on small screens.

More trust
Clearer decisions
Gentler user experience

Ready to request care with confidence?

You can keep the same booking logic and still make the experience feel more premium, reassuring, and conversion-friendly.

Who is CareVia?

A clearer presentation of the project, the mission, and how caregiver selection works.

What is CareVia?

CareVia is a local elderly-care booking concept designed to help families find reassuring home support more easily.

Why we built it

The goal is to make elder care feel more human, more organized, and easier to understand from the first visit.

Our value

We focus on clarity, respectful presentation, and a calmer booking journey for families.

How caregivers are presented

Profiles are shown with practical details, service fit, ratings, and an easier side-by-side comparison.

Clearer pricing

Families can now understand the starting prices and the pricing rules before they continue booking.

Starting from
160 MAD

Home Care

  • Minimum booking2h
  • Hourly rate80 MAD
  • Travel feeCalculated by city
  • Night / weekend+20 MAD
Starting from
240 MAD

Medical Accompaniment

  • Minimum booking2h
  • Hourly rate120 MAD
  • Travel fee30 MAD
  • Night / weekend+25 MAD
Starting from
190 MAD

Personal Care

  • Minimum booking2h
  • Hourly rate95 MAD
  • Travel feeCalculated by city
  • Night / weekend+20 MAD
Starting from
140 MAD

Companionship

  • Minimum booking2h
  • Hourly rate70 MAD
  • Travel feeCalculated by city
  • Night / weekend+15 MAD
The live estimate updates during booking. Final confirmation may vary depending on the selected city, late hours, weekend timing, or accompaniment between cities.

What families say

Short testimonials help the service feel more real, local, and trustworthy.

S. B.
Casablanca

The booking steps felt simple, and the caregiver profile was clear enough for our family to decide quickly.

★★★★★

I liked seeing the hours and estimated total before finishing the request. It made the service feel more transparent.

Legal & policy pages

Essential pages that make the project feel more serious and trustworthy.

Privacy Policy

How contact details and booking information are handled.

Terms of Service

The basic service conditions, booking logic, and family responsibilities.

Cancellation Policy

Simple cancellation and rescheduling rules families can understand fast.

Frequently asked questions

Yes. CareVia accepts requests across Morocco, depending on city coverage, schedule, and caregiver availability.

After the request is submitted, the family receives a confirmation summary and is contacted to validate the details and next step.

Yes, changes can be requested before the visit is finalized, depending on caregiver availability.

Yes, repeated requests for the same caregiver can be reviewed when the schedule allows it.

For the best availability, families should ideally book in advance, especially for evenings, weekends, and accompaniment requests.

Yes. The cancellation page explains how rescheduling, cancellation timing, and refund review can work.

Privacy Policy

We only collect the booking details needed to review the request, contact the family, and organize the service.

What may be collected

Client name, contact details, city, selected service, date, hours, and caregiver preference.

How it is used

To confirm the request, prepare follow-up, and keep the family informed about the booking.

Sharing

Information should only be shared when necessary for service coordination and not for unrelated marketing.

CareVia
Home
Back to home

Terms of Service

These terms explain the basic booking flow, the family’s responsibility to provide correct information, and the review nature of each request.

Booking flow

A booking request is submitted first, then reviewed and confirmed with the family.

Information accuracy

Families should provide accurate client details, phone number, city, and schedule preference.

Availability

Caregiver choice and timing depend on availability and final coordination.

CareVia
Home
Back to home

Cancellation Policy

This page explains how cancellation, rescheduling, and refund review may work.

Early cancellation

Requests canceled early can be reviewed for easier rescheduling.

Late changes

Late changes may depend on caregiver availability and already reserved time.

Refund review

Any refund handling should be reviewed according to the timing and the service status.
